# required-cloud-run-secrets.txt — single source of truth for secrets that MUST
# be mounted on the `panelin-calc` Cloud Run service via the
# `--set-secrets=` flag in `.github/workflows/deploy-calc-api.yml`.
#
# WHY THIS FILE EXISTS
# --------------------
# `gcloud run deploy --set-secrets=...` is a FULL-REPLACE list: any secret not
# named on that single line is STRIPPED from the service on every deploy, even
# if it still exists in Google Secret Manager. This footgun caused three
# separate production regressions (PRs #313, #315, #317): IA keys, ML OAuth +
# token-encryption, and the WhatsApp access token were each silently dropped on
# a routine deploy because they were missing from the `--set-secrets` line.
#
# `scripts/gate-secrets-drift.mjs` (npm run gate:secrets) compares this list
# against the live `--set-secrets` line and FAILS the gate if they diverge, so
# the strip-regression cannot recur unnoticed.
#
# HOW TO EDIT
# -----------
# - One entry per line. Blank lines and `#` comments are ignored.
# - List the LEFT-hand mount target as it appears in `--set-secrets`
#   (`KEY=secret:latest` -> list `KEY`; a file mount such as
#   `/run/secrets/service-account.json=panelin-service-account:latest` ->
#   list `service-account.json`, the basename).
# - Adding a secret to the deploy line? Add it here in the SAME PR — the gate
#   fails if the workflow lists a secret this manifest does not, on purpose.
# - Removing a secret from the deploy line is a behavioural change: drop it from
#   both places and note why in the PR.

# --- File mounts ---
service-account.json

# --- Identity / auth / crypto ---
IDENTITY_JWT_SECRET
MFA_KEK_HEX
TOKEN_ENCRYPTION_KEY
SYNC_HMAC_SECRET

# --- Data stores ---
DATABASE_URL
SUPABASE_PGP_ENCRYPT_KEY

# --- Google Tasks OAuth ---
GOOGLE_TASKS_CLIENT_ID
GOOGLE_TASKS_CLIENT_SECRET

# --- MercadoLibre OAuth ---
ML_CLIENT_SECRET

# --- AI providers ---
ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
OPENAI_API_KEY
GROK_API_KEY
GEMINI_API_KEY
